data.title: Whale Cloud and AGIBOT Announce Strategic Partnership to Accelerate Global Expansion of Embodied AI
data.description: In Shanghai on April 20, 2026, Whale Cloud, a prominent company specializing in digital and intelligent solutions for telecommunications and enterprise clients, partnered with AGIBOT, a leading innovator in versatile embodied robots. This collaboration aims to jointly develop cutting-edge technology.
Sydbank A/S buyback program: week 16 transactions reported.

data.title: Novo Nordisk: Etavopivat is the first in a new class of drugs to meet both co-primary endpoints in the phase 3 HIBISCUS trial, substantially reducing vaso-occlusive crisis events and improving haemoglobin response in sickle cell disease
data.description: Novo Nordisk, a pharmaceutical company based in Bagsværd, Denmark, has revealed the key findings from the HIBISCUS trial conducted on April 20, 2026. This pivotal phase 3 study focused on once-daily oral etavopivat and its impact on individuals with sickle cell disease (SCD), comprising adults and adolescents. The results indicated a significant achievement, with etavopivat meeting the primary goals set for the trial. It demonstrated notable superiority in reducing vaso-occlusive crises (VOCs) and enhancing the haemoglobin (Hb) response compared to the placebo group. This promising outcome suggests a potential breakthrough in the treatment of SCD, offering new hope for patients.

data.title: BIS cautions about impacts of US dollar stablecoins on banks. Urges international cooperation in regulation - Hernández de Cos.
data.description: Pablo Hernández de Cos, the General Manager of the Bank for International Settlements, has expressed concerns regarding the potential risks to financial stability posed by US dollar stablecoins. He emphasized the need for enhanced global coordination in regulating stablecoins. This statement underscores the growing importance of addressing stablecoin risks, with de Cos advocating for stronger oversight and regulation in this rapidly evolving sector. Global cooperation in this endeavor is crucial, given the widespread use and potential impact of stablecoins on the financial system. The call for increased regulatory measures follows reports of stablecoins gaining popularity, with notable figures in the financial sector, including de Cos, raising alarm about the stability and oversight of these digital assets. As the use of stablecoins continues to rise, the need for a coordinated regulatory approach becomes more pressing to safeguard financial stability. De Cos's remarks highlight the urgency of establishing robust oversight mechanisms to monitor and address potential risks associated with stablecoins.

data.title: Wintrust Financial Earnings Are Imminent; These Most Accurate Analysts Revise Forecasts Ahead Of Earnings Call
data.description: After market close on April 20, Wintrust Financial Corporation (NASDAQ: WTFC) is set to report its first-quarter earnings. Analysts are predicting earnings of $2.96 per share, a rise from the previous year's $2.69 per share. The company is expected to reveal quarterly revenue of approximately $707.92 million, an increase from the $643.11 million reported last year. Recently, Wintrust Financial disclosed the retirement of board members H. Patrick Hackett Jr. and William J. Doyle. Following this news, Wintrust Financial's stock price climbed 2% to close at $148.17 on Friday. For further details, including the latest analyst ratings, readers can refer to the Analyst Stock Ratings page on Benzinga Pro.

data.title: WeRide’s WRD 3.0 Makes History as the Only Four‑Time Champion at China Urban Intelligent Driving Competition
data.description: During the recent Second China Urban Intelligent Driving Competition held in Wuhu and organized by D1EV, the Chery Exeed Sterra ET, featuring WRD 3.0 technology, claimed the top spot.

data.title: Sight Machine Advances Autonomous Agents for Manufacturing with AI Agent Crews
data.description: In Hannover, Germany on April 20, 2026, Sight Machine Inc., a top industrial AI platform, has launched autonomous agentic operations in manufacturing. This new system involves crews of autonomous AI agents that are dedicated to monitoring and optimizing production processes continuously. These agents work non-stop to ensure efficient and effective operations. This innovation signifies a significant step towards automation in the manufacturing industry and highlights the importance of AI in enhancing productivity.

data.title: PPG invests in testing line for radiation-curable coatings at Marly, France
data.description: PPG revealed the introduction of a state-of-the-art testing facility for radiation-curable coatings in Marly, France. This innovative testing line at the R&D Center of Excellence is capable of assessing various curing methods, such as infrared, ultraviolet (including LED, excimer, and arc lamps), and electron beam technologies. By replicating customer production settings effectively, this significant investment aims to expedite development processes and minimize customer trialing. This move signifies PPG's commitment to enhancing research capabilities and meeting customer needs.

data.title: Fraport Greece and AirportLabs Partner to Optimise Operations Across 14 Regional Airports
data.description: In London on April 20, 2026, Fraport Greece has initiated a comprehensive digital transformation across all regional airports under its management. The endeavor involves the adoption of AirportLabs' Airport Community App after a competitive tender process. This network-wide rollout signifies a significant step towards enhancing operational efficiencies and passenger experience.

data.title: Administration to refund $166B in tariffs post Supreme Court decision, importers to be repaid after 2 months.
data.description: Following the Supreme Court's decision to strike down tariffs central to the president's trade policy, the government plans to introduce a new system for repaying importers. Under this system, importers will be refunded within a two-month timeframe after the import transaction.

data.title: Gas prices rise quickly when oil prices spike, but fall slowly as station owners aim to recoup losses.
data.description: When oil prices increase, fuel station owners bear part of the cost burden to provide relief to consumers. Conversely, when oil prices decrease, they attempt to regain their losses by adjusting fuel prices at the pumps. This process helps stabilize prices for consumers and owners alike.

NEURONES discloses transactions on treasury shares for Apr 13-17, 2026, without specifying the source.

data.title: Aktsiaselts Infortar Investor Webinar introducing the results of the Q1 2026
data.description: On May 4, 2026, Infortar is set to hold a webinar for investors at 12:00 (EET) in Estonian and at 14:00 (EET) in English. This event aims to present the company's first quarter 2026 results. Key speakers include Managing Director Martti Talgre and Investor Relations Manager Kadri Laanvee.

data.title: BlackRock® Canada Announces April Cash Distributions for the iShares® ETFs
data.description: Today, BlackRock Asset Management Canada Limited, a subsidiary of BlackRock, Inc., revealed the cash distributions for iShares ETFs listed on TSX or Cboe Canada in April 2026. These payments are monthly and will be awarded to unitholders recorded for the respective iShares ETF on April 27, 2026. The cash distributions for these ETFs are scheduled to be paid out on April 30, 2026.

data.title: Bombardier and Vista Sign Service Agreement Focused on Smart Parts Programs
data.description: On April 20, 2026, Bombardier partnered with Vista to unveil a new long-term services agreement relating to Bombardier’s Smart Parts programs. This deal applies to Vista's recent purchase of Challenger 3500 aircraft and a significant portion of their current fleet. Under this customized agreement, Vista will benefit from a cost-per-flight hour structure, ensuring optimal convenience and cost stability for parts.

data.title: Fortuna Establishes Presence in the Guyana Shield Through Quartzstone Earn-In Agreement
data.description: Fortuna Mining Corp. has recently signed an agreement with Qstone Inc., a private Guyanese company, to obtain up to a 70% stake in the Quartzstone Project. This project covers a significant area of 29,600 hectares situated in the greenstone belt in north central Guyana. The agreement allows Fortuna to potentially acquire a majority interest in the project, indicating a substantial development in the mining sector. This collaboration signifies a significant opportunity for both companies to leverage their expertise and resources in the exploration and potential exploitation of the mineral-rich land package. The agreement signifies a strategic move for Fortuna Mining Corp. (NYSE: FSM | TSX: FVI) as they expand their portfolio and presence in the region.

data.title: The 9th China Festival of Education: Shaping the Future of Learning
data.description: The 9th China Festival of Education, held on April 18, 2026 in Shanghai, saw a record-breaking turnout with over 70 speakers and 800 attendees from various parts of China and globally. This event has become a crucial platform in the country, attracting unprecedented participation numbers.
